name: Hotel O Banda Aceh near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman formerly Wisma Tsacita

reviews.originalComment: Kamar bersih, harga terjangkau, fasilitas okay AC dingin televisi nyala. Staf ramah enak. Tempat nyaman
reviews.reviewComments: Clean room, affordable price, okay facilities, cold AC, television works. Friendly and nice staff. Comfortable place.

reviews.reviewTitle: Its cheap but if your concern is cleanliness, then can go somewhere better
reviews.reviewPositives: Staff is very helpful. Wifi okay. Pillow and blanket is goof as well. Its not loud, the road aoutside is not loud as well.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Room is not that close with Masjid Baitulrahaman as it suggested

The room is smelly from the toilet, i think its from the septic tank. The smell comes out from the drain holes. 

The ceiling/wall some are mouldy. You can see traces of leaking as well. So when you lie down and look up, it feels like the place is not clean.

Toilet flush cant be use.

reviews.originalComment: Worthy dengan harga segitu. Dapet dilantai 2 view paginya bagus banget. Kamarnya bersih. Parkirnya aman.
reviews.reviewComments: Worth it for that price. The room on the 2nd floor has a really nice morning view. The room is clean. Parking is safe.

reviews.originalComment:
* Resepsionis cantik dan ganteng
* Pelayanan ramah dan lembut 
* Kebersihan selalu di utamakan
* Keamanan terjaga
* Ketika Kendala atau masalah cepat action
* Karena keramahan pelayanannya keluarga saya Betah sampai ginap 10 malam 
🫶👍👍
reviews.reviewComments:
* Beautiful and handsome receptionists
* Friendly and gentle service
* Cleanliness is always prioritized
* Security is maintained
* Quick action in case of obstacles or problems
* Because of the friendliness of the service, my family felt comfortable staying until 10 at night
🫶👍👍

reviews.originalComment:
Pelayanan bagus. Ramah .tempat bersih pokoknya direkomendasikan. 
Silahkan dicoba. Nyaman banget. Gak bakal kecewa deh...
reviews.reviewComments: Good service. Friendly. Clean place, highly recommended. Please give it a try. Very comfortable. You won't be disappointed...

reviews.reviewNegatives: Beskidt, ingen vand, toilet virke ikke, små dyr  og mm.

reviews.originalComment: Sekedar rehat beberapa jam dan mandi bolehlah. Air lebih lancar lagi ya. Tingkatkan kebersihan mulai dari teras.  Jika spre tdk diganti minta saja pd pelayan ganti sdiri. Mereka berikan kok. Pertama kali seumur hidup nginap d htel O. Emergency. Jika kurang memuaskan maklum saja sesuai harga. Lokasi lumayan strategis. Bisa jalan kaki cari makan/ngopi tanpa bawa mobil.
reviews.reviewComments: Just take a few hours to rest and shower. The water flows more smoothly now. Improve cleanliness starting from the terrace. If the sheets are not changed, just ask the staff to change them yourself. They will provide it. It's my first time in my life staying at hotel O. Emergency. If it is not satisfactory, it's understandable according to the price. The location is quite strategic. You can walk to find food or coffee without taking a car.

reviews.originalComment: Kamar bersih, harga terjangkau, fasilitas okay AC dingin televisi nyala. Staf ramah enak. Tempat nyaman

reviews.originalComment: Kebersihan oke, staff nya ramah dan baik , fasilitas lengkap seperti tv dan wifi. Wajib ke sini sih. Nanti kalau ke aceh lagi pasti ke sini lagi. Rekomended
reviews.reviewComments: Cleanliness is good, the staff is friendly and nice, complete facilities like TV and Wi-Fi. I must come here. If I go to Aceh again, I will definitely come here again. Recommended.

reviews.originalComment: Letak penginapan yang strategis memberikan kemudahan serta kenyamanan saat kita hendak mengunjungi tempat-tempat terbaik di Banda Aceh 👍👍👍👍👍
reviews.reviewComments: A strategically located accommodation provides convenience and comfort when we want to visit the best places in Banda Aceh. 👍👍👍👍👍

reviews.originalComment: Cocok banget buat yg bingung mau cari tempat penginapan murah dan nyaman baik untuk sendiri maupun bareng keluarga
reviews.reviewComments: Perfect for those who are confused about finding cheap and comfortable accommodations, whether for themselves or with family.

reviews.originalComment: Bagi yang sedang bepergian ke Banda Aceh, ini adalah penginapan yang sangat rekomended, dengan lokasi dekat dengan pusat kota tapi dengan suasana yang sangat tenang dan nyaman.
reviews.reviewComments: For those traveling to Banda Aceh, this is a highly recommended accommodation, located close to the city center but with a very calm and comfortable atmosphere.

reviews.originalComment: Menginap disini memberikan kenyamanan tersendiri karena letak yang strategis dan akses yang sangat mudah karena dekat dengan pusat kota
reviews.reviewComments: Staying here offers a unique comfort due to its strategic location and very easy access as it is close to the city center.

reviews.reviewTitle: Clean and the prices are very affordable.
reviews.originalComment: Bersih dan harga sangat terjangkau. Recommended banget utk standard Oyo
reviews.reviewComments: Clean and very affordable. Highly recommended for Oyo standards.

reviews.reviewTitle: Everything was good except facilities. Please improve the backup electicity
reviews.reviewComments: Everything was good except facilities to improvise such as electricity backup and wifi speed limits.

reviews.reviewTitle: Clean room  to improve facilities due to electricity cut off
reviews.reviewComments: Clean room but please improve hotel facilities.. power failure and room was hot without air conditioning.

+ lokasi strategis di tengah kota & gampang diakses dengan transportasi umum
+ Resepsionis ramah & baik hati
+ Termasuk murah dengan lokasi n fasilitas yg diberikan 

- AC berfungsi dengan baik tapi sama sekali ga dipake karna ga tahan baunya. Sepanjang malam jendela ku buka biar angin masuk. Mungkin perlu di bersihin AC nya biar kamar ga apek .

reviews.reviewTitle: The service is very good, the place is nice, and please improve the available facilities such as fixing the TV and ensuring that the Wi-Fi on the third floor is available as ordered. Please enhance the facilities and quality again.
reviews.originalTitle: Pelayanan sangat baik, tempat bagus, dan mohon tingkatkan fasilitas yg tersedia seperti tv diperbaiki dan wifi dilantai 3 tersedia sesuai pemesanan. Tingkatkan kmbli fasilitas dan kualitas
reviews.originalComment: Tempatnya bagus dan pelayanan sangat baik. fasilitas tv dan wifi tertera di pemesanan tetapi di lantai 3 wifi tidak ada dan tv tidak berfungsi. Jadi mohon untuk tv diperbaiki dan pemasangan wifi dilantai 3 sesuai fasilitas yang sudah tertulis di dalam pemesanan. jika tersedia maka mohon berfungsi dengan baik. Kedepan kami akan memesan kembali memastikan apakah hotel ini dapat perbaikan fasilitas sesuai pemesanan. Mohon pihak hotel ditingkat kembali fasilitas dan kualitas hotel sesuai pemesanan tersedia. Terima kasih
reviews.reviewComments: The place is nice and the service is very good. The TV and wifi facilities were listed in the booking but on the third floor, there is no wifi and the TV is not functioning. So please fix the TV and install wifi on the third floor as per the amenities listed in the booking. If available, please ensure it works well. In the future, we will rebook to confirm whether this hotel can improve the facilities as per the booking. I ask the hotel to enhance the facilities and the quality of the hotel according to the booking. Thank you.

reviews.reviewTitle: You got what you paid for
reviews.reviewComments: Cheap hotel, Small room, average bathroom cleanliness, near to shops. No stairs. Recommended for travelers who are on the thight budget and for short stay.
Kalau ke Banda Aceh pasti nginap di sini, lokasi di tengah kota, staff ramah,  kamar besih dan nyaman.
Suasananya homely banget, senyaman tinggal di rumah sendiri,  staffnya ramah, lokasinya di tengah kota jadi dekat mau kemana-mana.

reviews.reviewTitle: Good service, nice place, please provide Wi-Fi on the 3rd floor and fix the TV according to the amenities listed in the booking. Also, please repair the loose door on the 3rd floor.
reviews.originalTitle: Pelayanan baik, tempat bagus, wifi dilantai 3 mohon disediakan dan tv diperbaiki sesuai fasilitas yg tertera dipemesanan. Dan pintu longgar di lantai 3 mohon diperbaiki
reviews.originalComment: Tempatnya bagus dan pelayanan sangat baik. fasilitas tv dan wifi tertera di pemesanan tetapi di lantai 3 wifi tidak ada dan tv tidak berfungsi. Jadi mohon untuk tv diperbaiki dan pemasangan wifi dilantai 3 sesuai fasilitas yang sudah tertulis di dalam pemesanan. jika tersedia maka mohon berfungsi dengan baik. Kedepan kami akan memesan kembali memastikan apakah hotel ini dapat perbaikan fasilitas sesuai pemesanan. Dan mohon pintu di lantai 3 yang longgar disisi pinggit pintu kamar yg bisa diintip orang dari luar kamar kedalam kamar tolong di perbaiki agar pintu tertutup rapat. Mohon pihak hotel ditingkat kembali fasilitas dan kualitas hotel sesuai pemesanan tersedia. Terima kasih
reviews.reviewComments: The place is nice and the service is very good. The TV and wifi facilities are mentioned in the reservation, but on the third floor, there is no wifi and the TV is not functioning. So please fix the TV and install wifi on the third floor according to the facilities that were stated in the reservation. If available, please ensure it works well. In the future, we will make another reservation to see if this hotel can improve the facilities according to the reservation. Also, please fix the loose door on the third floor, which can be peeked into from outside the room, to ensure the door closes tightly. We hope the hotel can improve the facilities and quality in accordance with the reservation. Thank you.

The rooms smells sooo bad, the beds not stable, the toilet full of stains. Not clean
THEY DONT CLEAN THE FLOOR, it’s so wet i fell on the stairs, almost broke my neck

reviews.originalComment:
Hotel nya bersih nyaman
Tp anak saya ada 1 masih umur 12 tahun dikenakan biaya tambahan ekstra bed
Tp nggk dikasi tempat tidur tambahan nya
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is clean and comfortable. But my child, who is 12 years old, was charged an extra fee for an extra bed, but they didn't provide the additional bed.

Saya tak rekmen nginap di sini sangat teruk, air tak ada letrik terputus, bilik kotor, air paip berbau, dalam bilik & toilet bau kepam tak enak, staff tak berapa friendly tanya 1 jwb 1 , banyak harus di perbaiki kalau mahu meniaga lama, mungkin pada guest yg berasal dari sana kebersihan ok, tapi bagi pelancung asing itu tidak bersih mmg kotor, sekitar hotel juga kotor, harus di upgrade segala facilities nya ya. Kalau yg tak kisah rentang kebersihan iya ok, tapi guest kebtkan mau zzzz selesa. Harap pihak hotel @ owner perbaiki ya, semoga success.

reviews.reviewTitle: Quite reasonably priced at that cost.
reviews.originalComment: Cukup la dengan harga segitu. Yg penting AC dingin.. Emang kamar bocor. Tp maklum aja sih harga sgitu..
reviews.reviewComments: That's enough with that price. What's important is the AC is cold.. The room does have leaks. But I guess it's understandable for that price..

The hotel has changed its name from RedDoorz Syariah to O Hotel. I had originally booked and paid for my stay under RedDoorz Syariah. However, upon arrival, the receptionist informed me that I needed to rebook since my reservation was tied to the old hotel name. As we arrived late at night due to a flight delay, we had no choice but to rebook. Unfortunately, the new booking cost twice the price of my original payment.
We were assigned Room ***, and upon entering, we were shocked by the condition. The room had no dustbin, the toilet was extremely dirty, and there were cobwebs in the room.
To make matters worse, upon check-out, my husband discovered that his sandals had been stolen.
This entire experience was unacceptable. I kindly request a refund of my money, as what we went through was unfair and far below reasonable standards.

reviews.originalComment: Peralatan mandi tidak ada, kamar mandi jorok gayung dan bak mandi tidak di cuci sebelum dgunakan pelanggan.
reviews.reviewComments: There are no bathing utensils, the bathroom is dirty, and the bucket and bathtub are not cleaned before being used by customers.

reviews.originalComment: Jorok pakek kecoa, kamar mandi kuning kuning, shower rusak, air minum tidak ada, yang ada hanya handuk, lorong bnyak sampah, lantai kotor
reviews.reviewComments: Dirty with cockroaches, yellow bathroom, broken shower, no drinking water, only towels available, hallway full of trash, dirty floor.

reviews.reviewTitle: The room is dirty, the bed feels like it sinks in.
reviews.originalTitle: kamarnya kotor, tempat tidur berasa amblas per nya
reviews.originalComment: kamarnya kotor, tempat tidur berasa amblas per nya, pesan kamar yg tempat tidur bed deluxe malah dikasih kamar yg ukuran tempat tidur twin bed owalahh dah gitu kuramg banget tempat tidurnya ditidurin gak enak bikin badan sakit. diatas tempat tidur ada sarang laba laba. sumpah ini kamar yg paling kotor sih. pelayanan yg sangat tidak memuaskan. kita bayar malah serasa dikasih kamar dipojokan kamar pembantu di lantai dua. dah gitu gak ada difasilitasi handuk dan perlengkapan mandi hotel kayak nginap di *** lain.
reviews.reviewComments: The room is dirty, the bed feels sunken in, I booked a deluxe bed room but was given a room with a twin bed instead. On top of that, the bed is very uncomfortable to sleep on, making my body hurt. There's a spider's web above the bed. I swear this is the dirtiest room ever. The service is very unsatisfactory. We paid and it feels like we were given a room in a helper's corner on the second floor. On top of that, there are no towels or bathroom amenities provided, it's like staying at a different hotel.
Kebersihan kurang, ukuran kamar kecil sekali di lt.3, tangganya kecil
Okelah buat harga segitu
Berbaloi untuk sekadar berehat tidur.
Lokasi oke dekat blangpadang walau agak masuk. Kebersihan oke, staff oke
Sangat direkomendasikan
Very good ac working well, cheap and convenient near to mall
Bilik tak dijaga dengan baik.
Harga murah, staff ramah, senyaman nginap di rumah.

reviews.reviewTitle: Fraud, when arriving at the hotel location, there was none. Asked the people around and many were looking for it but there was no hotel.
reviews.originalTitle: Penipuan, sampai dilokasi hotel tidak ada. Tanya sama orang sekitar banyaknyg mencari tapi tidak ada hotelnya
reviews.originalComment: Penipuan cuy, mau murah malah buntung. Mau batalin tapi  tapi ga bisa. Haram lah yg buat ni penipu
reviews.reviewComments: It's a scam, trying to be cheap but in the end losing money. I want to cancel it but can't. It's forbidden what these scammers are doing.

reviews.originalComment: Tempatnya bagus bersih dan paginya di tengah kota,nyaman banget pastinya rekomendasi sih
reviews.reviewComments: The place is nice, clean, and in the city center in the morning, definitely very comfortable and recommended.

reviews.originalComment: luar biasa dengan harga semurah ini
reviews.reviewComments: incredible at such a low price
very cheap compared to other hotels

reviews.originalComment: Untuk harga under 200 its worth it
reviews.reviewComments: For a price under 200, it's worth it.

reviews.originalComment: Sudah beberapa kali nginap disini dan tak pernah bosan untuk kembali lagi 👍👍👍👍👍
reviews.reviewComments: I've stayed here several times and never get bored of coming back again 👍👍👍👍👍

reviews.originalComment: Staff Ramah, kebersihan oke
reviews.reviewComments: Ramah staff, cleanliness is okay.

reviews.originalComment: Penginapan dekat pusat kota dengan suasana yang nyaman dan tenang
reviews.reviewComments: Accommodation near the city center with a comfortable and peaceful atmosphere.
Es bueno para estancias cortas 1 o 2 días
最高！

Pelayanan sangat istimewa 
Staf cantik dan ganteng
Pelayanan Ramah dan sopan
Untuk fasilitas mungkin bisa upgrade lagi. Terkait balkon yang sudah kurang terawat juga atap ketika hujan di sebagian tempat bocor.
Mengakibatkan staf kewalahan untuk membersihkan ketika musim hujan tiba

Emang murah sih kalo pesan lewat aplikasi, tapi tetap gak sesuai harga kayaknya, andai aja kebersihannya di jaga, air nya gak kuning kasurnya di ganti, mungkin lebih mahal pun orang bakal mau kesini, kalo pesan manual ***terlalu mahal bagi saya🙏🏼
Ada uang deposit juga ***semoga bisa berbenah lagibkedepannya

Untuk kebersihan kamr mandinya, ya Allah, saya udah bbrpa kali nginanp di hotel dgn keliarga kecil saya, tapi yg ini memang memprihatinkan sekali, kamar mandi nya sebenarnya bagus jika bersih, msalahnya ini tidak dibersihkan sama sekali, seperti tidak niat menerima tamu, ember penampung air berkerak, kloset apalgi, kaca kmr mandi sudh kusam gak prnh digosok, lantainya licin, ya syudahlah... Untung semalam menginap, tambah lagi, ac nya pas kami dtg baru mau dibersihkan, ac tidak dingin..
Seprei dan srg bantal ntah diganti ntah gak..
pdhl saya suka lokasinya..dan sya lihat byk yg nginap dsna, tpi knpa plyanannya buruk, pas dtg gak ada yg jaga..salahny saya gak ambil foto saat itu..
Saya sudah reservasi jauh2 hari dan saya kalah dengan rombongan yg baru tiba di hari H. Mereka tidak paham apa itu sistem reservasi. Saya di alihkan ke hotel lain
Jorok sangat jorong Bauk dan TDK terawat kapok kesini lagi baru cek in langsung plg GK tahan air nya Bauk banget pengen muntah seprai TDK di ganti

Tidak seperti fasilitas yang ditawarkan di aplikasi. 
Kamar mandi airnya sangat bau, kebersihan kamar juga kurang, staff tidak ramah

Air kamar mandi hidupnya kecil, dan sangat bauu, kamar kotor, lantai 3 ada rooftop tapi sangat kotor jadi tidak bisa digunakan juga, kami datang musim liburan petugasnya cuma satu orang merangkap resepsionis dan pegawai kebersihan, saat ditanya alasannya yg lain libur semua. Jadi kewalahan dalam melayani checkin dan komplain tamu, sebaiknya jangan menginap disini, menginap ditempat lain saja dengan tambahan sekitar 50 ribu lagi sudah dapat tempat yg bersih dan nyaman, daripada disini murah dikit tapi sangat kotor dan pelayanannya buruk.
AC nya ada rumah laba-laba. Pintu kamar kurang rapat, ada celah yang bisa buat ngintip. Di bawah tempat tdur ada sampah yang tidak di bersihkan.

Foto tidak sesuai dengan aslinya. 
Penginapan buruk, masak pintu ga rapat. Orang masih bisa liat kita dari luar, karna rongga2 nya ya mmg sebesar itu, jadi ga nyaman. Dan ga punya privasi.

Dan kasurnya juga jelek bgt, dikit balik badan,langsung bunyi krek krek.
Dinding pembatas antar kamar juga triplek, dan ruangnya juga sempit. Ga cocok untuk pasutri.
Dan agak kotor.

Intinya dg harga 120 ga cocok dgn keadaan seperti itu.
Yang bagus cuma AC doang, lain minusssss semua.
Mulai dari pintunya yg berongga,kasur jelek, berdebu, sprei udah hitam, keset kaki udah kotor bgt.  Wc joorok, kamar mndi jorok, tv hidup tapi tetap zonk karna gaada sinyal.

Intinya semua kurang, kecuali AC.

hotelnya ga sesuai dgan apk, pdhal udah booking tipe delux double tpi dpatnya malah twins standar mna pesannya 2 kamar, sedangkan dri pihak hotelnya ga ada solusi tetap ga dikasih kamar yg kami pesan (deluxe double) dgan alasan apknya blum terupdate, sistem hotelnya siapa dluan sampai situ dapat kamar walaupun udah booking dan bayar lunas di apk, fasilitasnya ga sesuai juga dgn apk, peralatan mandi tidak dpat kecuali sabun mandi tapi ntuk kebersihannya bolehla
jdi bagi yg mau nginap pikir2 aja dlu usahain jgan order bg apk takut kejadiannya sama kaya kami
Saran untuk pengelola hotel agar lebih standbye, lebih bersih.
Udah bisa lah
Kurang bersih2 tempat nya, pintu kamar juga rusak gk bisa di kunci.
kamar dan air mandi tidak bersih.lingkungan kurang bersih
udah bayar tapi kamar penuh. alasannya ga liat aplikasi. kecewa banget

Грязно, нет горячей воды, умывальника, мыла, туалетной бумаги, друга покусали клопы.
